title: Al-Faradzaq's flight from Ziyad
description: I was told by 'Umar b. Shabbah-Abu 'Ubaydah and Abu alHasan al-Mada'ini and others: When al-Farazdaq satirized the Banu Nahshal and the Banu Fuqaym... Abu Zayd did not add to the chain of authorities (isnad) of his report more than I have mentioned. As for Muhammad b. 'Ali, he told me according to Muhammad b. Sa'd330-Abu 'Ubaydah-A'yan b. Labatah b. alFarazdaq-his father-his father: When I satirized al-Ashhab b. Rumaylah and al-Ba'ith they were both disgraced. The Banu Nahshal and the Banu Fuqaym incited Ziyad b. Abi Sufyan against me.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
